interfaces.name: Book
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Book { var id: UUID; var title: String; var author: String; var coverImageData: Data?; var isbn: String?; var genre: String?; var status: ReadingStatus; var startedDate: Date?; var finishedDate: Date?; var createdAt: Date; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var entries: [Entry] }
interfaces.notes: title/author only required; cover stored as downsampled thumbnail only, never full-res

interfaces.name: ReadingStatus
interfaces.signature: enum ReadingStatus: String, Codable, Sendable { case wantToRead, currentlyReading, finished, didNotFinish }
interfaces.notes: never inferred from entry count

interfaces.name: Entry
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Entry { var id: UUID; @Relationship var book: Book?; var quoteText: String; var pageLocation: String?; var rating: Int?; var reflection: String?; var source: EntrySource; var createdAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: the one canonical writable record; book optional for quote-first capture; TimelineItem is derived from this and never written back to it

interfaces.name: EntrySource
interfaces.signature: enum EntrySource: String, Codable, Sendable { case manual, ocr }
interfaces.notes: no siriIntent case; Siri/App Intent capture is a manual entry point, not a distinct persisted domain source

interfaces.name: Circle
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Circle { var id: UUID; var name: String; var createdAt: Date; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var members: [CircleMember] }
interfaces.notes: data model supports many circles; UI caps free tier at one

interfaces.name: CircleMember
interfaces.signature: @Model final class CircleMember { var id: UUID; var displayName: String; var contactIdentifier: String?; var phoneNumber: String?; var email: String?; var addedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: contactIdentifier from CNContactPickerViewController; phone/email from manual fallback

interfaces.name: ShareEvent
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ShareEvent { var id: UUID; var entryID: UUID; var circleID: UUID?; var bookTitleSnapshot: String; var authorSnapshot: String; var quoteTextSnapshot: String; var pageLocationSnapshot: String?; var reflectionSnapshot: String?; var ratingSnapshot: Int?; var recipientNamesSnapshot: [String]; var sharedAt: Date; var channel: ShareChannel }
interfaces.notes: immutable denormalized snapshot; no recipientMemberIDs — circleID plus name snapshot satisfy every locked history requirement without a speculative field

interfaces.name: ShareChannel
interfaces.signature: enum ShareChannel: String, Codable, Sendable { case messagesCompose, activitySheetFallback }
interfaces.notes: cases map 1:1 onto ShareComposePresentation for deterministic tests

interfaces.name: AppSettings
interfaces.signature: @Model final class AppSettings { var id: UUID; var appLockEnabled: Bool; var appLockGracePeriodSeconds: Int; var onboardingCompleted: Bool; var hasSeenSinglePageScanTip: Bool; var subscriptionTier: SubscriptionTier }
interfaces.notes: single row; local feature flag only, no StoreKit wiring in v1

interfaces.name: TimelineItem
interfaces.signature: struct TimelineItem: Identifiable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let bookID: UUID?; let bookTitle: String?; let author: String?; let quoteText: String; let pageLocation: String?; let rating: Int?; let source: EntrySource; let createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: dedicated read-only Timeline projection with no relationship to fault; bookTitle/author optional to render an honest 'unfiled quote' row; never independently mutated or saved

interfaces.name: StatsSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct StatsSnapshot: Sendable { let booksFinished: Int; let quotesSaved: Int; let currentStreakDays: Int; let favoriteAuthors: [String]; let currentlyReadingCount: Int }
interfaces.notes: shared output for stats screen, widgets, and wrap-up teaser

interfaces.name: BookRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol BookRepository: Sendable { func fetchAll() async throws -> [Book]; func fetch(id: UUID) async throws -> Book?; func save(_ book: Book) async throws; func delete(id: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: book count assumed small, unbounded fetch acceptable

interfaces.name: EntryRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol EntryRepository: Sendable { func fetchTimeline(limit: Int, offset: Int) async throws -> [TimelineItem]; func fetch(bookID: UUID) async throws -> [Entry]; func fetch(id: UUID) async throws -> Entry?; func save(_ entry: Entry) async throws; func delete(id: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: fetchTimeline is the only timeline-loading method and the only paginated one; fetch(bookID:) returns canonical Entry since per-book counts are small; no duplicate raw-Entry timeline method

interfaces.name: CircleRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol CircleRepository: Sendable { func fetchPrimaryCircle() async throws -> Circle?; func createCircle(name: String) async throws -> Circle; func addMember(_ member: CircleMember, to circle: Circle) async throws; func removeMember(id: UUID) async throws }
interfaces.notes: removeMember must not cascade to ShareEvent history

interfaces.name: ShareEventRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol ShareEventRepository: Sendable { func recordShare(_ event: ShareEvent) async throws; func fetchHistory(entryID: UUID) async throws -> [ShareEvent]; func fetchHistory(circleID: UUID) async throws -> [ShareEvent] }
interfaces.notes: supports both entry-level and circle-level share history surfaces

interfaces.name: SettingsRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol SettingsRepository: Sendable { func loadSettings() async throws -> AppSettings; func saveSettings(_ settings: AppSettings) async throws }
interfaces.notes: app lock and onboarding settings live here

interfaces.name: StatsService
interfaces.signature: protocol StatsService: Sendable { func loadStats(now: Date) async throws -> StatsSnapshot }
interfaces.notes: centralizes deterministic stats logic; caller injects now

interfaces.name: DocumentScanService
interfaces.signature: protocol DocumentScanService: Sendable { func scanSinglePage() async throws -> ScannedPage }
interfaces.notes: wraps VNDocumentCameraViewController; production + fake implementations required

interfaces.name: ScannedPage
interfaces.signature: struct ScannedPage: Sendable { let image: CGImage; let capturedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: single normalized image payload

interfaces.name: OCRService
interfaces.signature: protocol OCRService: Sendable { func recognizeText(in image: CGImage) async throws -> RecognizedTextResult }
interfaces.notes: wraps VNRecognizeTextRequest; fixture-testable independent of scanner lifecycle

interfaces.name: OCRResult
interfaces.signature: struct OCRResult: Sendable { let recognizedText: String; let confidence: Float?; let hadNoText: Bool }
interfaces.notes: hadNoText distinguishes normal no-text state from thrown failures.

interfaces.name: ShareComposerService
interfaces.signature: protocol ShareComposerService: Sendable { func makeSharePayload(entry: Entry, book: Book, recipients: [CircleMember]) async throws -> SharePayload; func canSendMessages() -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Builds the exact share content and selects Messages vs share-sheet path.

interfaces.name: SharePayload
interfaces.signature: struct SharePayload: Sendable { let messageBody: String; let recipientHandles: [String] }
interfaces.notes: Used by UI bridge to MessageUI or activity sheet.

interfaces.name: AppLockService
interfaces.signature: protocol AppLockService: Sendable { func evaluateUnlock() async -> Bool; func shouldRelock(afterBackgroundAt: Date?, now: Date, gracePeriod: Int) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Biometric/passcode gate plus grace-window logic.

interfaces.name: DateProvider
interfaces.signature: protocol DateProvider: Sendable { var now: Date { get } }
interfaces.notes: Shared determinism seam for stats, streaks, and app-lock timing.

interfaces.name: TimelineModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class TimelineModel { var items: [TimelineItem]; var loadState: LoadState; func load() async; func loadMore() async; func deleteEntry(id: UUID) async }
interfaces.notes: backed by TimelineItem only, via EntryRepository.fetchTimeline; never a full-table fetch

interfaces.name: EntryComposeModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class EntryComposeModel { var draft: EntryDraft; var state: SaveState; func applyOCRResult(_ result: RecognizedTextResult); func save() async }
interfaces.notes: manual, OCR-prefilled, and Siri-prefilled paths all converge here

interfaces.name: EntryDraft
interfaces.signature: struct EntryDraft: Sendable { var bookID: UUID?; var quoteText: String; var pageLocation: String?; var rating: Int?; var reflection: String?; var source: EntrySource }
interfaces.notes: shuttles data through capture flow before Entry persists

interfaces.name: OCRReviewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class OCRReviewModel { var recognizedText: String; var state: LoadState; func continueToCompose() -> EntryDraft; func resetToManual() -> EntryDraft }
interfaces.notes: the dedicated confirm-and-edit moment before compose

interfaces.name: CircleModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class CircleModel { var circle: Circle?; var members: [CircleMember]; var shareHistory: [ShareEvent]; var state: LoadState; func load() async; func addMember(_ contact: PickedContact) async throws; func removeMember(id: UUID) async; func share(entry: Entry, to members: [CircleMember]) async throws }
interfaces.notes: supports empty/configured/limit-reached states; outbound-only sharing

interfaces.name: StatsModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class StatsModel { var snapshot: StatsSnapshot?; var state: LoadState; func load() async }
interfaces.notes: consumes StatsService output only; no inline date math in views

interfaces.name: LoadState
interfaces.signature: enum LoadState: Sendable { case idle, loading, loaded, empty, error(String) }
interfaces.notes: shared across Timeline/Stats/Circle for reachable empty/loading/error states

interfaces.name: SaveState
interfaces.signature: enum SaveState: Sendable { case idle, saving, saved, validationError(String), error(String) }
interfaces.notes: local save should be near-instant; a stuck spinner is a bug

interfaces.name: buildSharedModelContainer
interfaces.signature: func buildSharedModelContainer(appGroupID: String) throws -> ModelContainer
interfaces.notes: single construction path for app and widget targets; no separate intents extension target exists

interfaces.name: migrateIfNeeded
interfaces.signature: func migrateIfNeeded(container: ModelContainer) throws
interfaces.notes: schema migration entry point, invoked during app bootstrap

interfaces.name: EntrySourceType
interfaces.signature: enum EntrySourceType: String, Codable, Sendable { case manual, ocr }
interfaces.notes: Do not persist transport-specific cases like siriIntent; App Intent capture still resolves to manual at the domain layer.

interfaces.name: ShareDeliveryMethod
interfaces.signature: enum ShareDeliveryMethod: String, Codable, Sendable { case messagesCompose, activitySheetFallback }
interfaces.notes: Persist the actual delivery path used after canSendText fallback resolution.

interfaces.name: SubscriptionTier
interfaces.signature: enum SubscriptionTier: String, Codable, Sendable { case free, paid }
interfaces.notes: gates OCR entry point and second circle in UI only

interfaces.name: SchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum SchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version; static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] }
interfaces.notes: first schema version, wired into SchemaMigrationPlan from commit one

interfaces.name: ChapterlyMigrationPlan
interfaces.signature: enum ChapterlyMigrationPlan: SchemaMigrationPlan { static var schemas: [any VersionedSchema.Type]; static var stages: [MigrationStage] }
interfaces.notes: empty stages today; the seam that prevents a destructive first migration

interfaces.name: DocumentScanError
interfaces.signature: enum DocumentScanError: Error { case cancelled, cameraUnavailable, permissionDenied, multiplePagesReturned }
interfaces.notes: multiple pages rejected explicitly, never silently truncated to page 0

interfaces.name: RecognizedTextResult
interfaces.signature: struct RecognizedTextResult: Sendable { let text: String; let hasDetectedText: Bool }
interfaces.notes: no-text-detected is a normal terminal state, never an exceptional path

interfaces.name: MessageComposerService
interfaces.signature: protocol MessageComposerService: Sendable { func canSendText() -> Bool; func composePresentation(for payload: ShareComposePayload) -> ShareComposePresentation }
interfaces.notes: Messages-vs-fallback decision lives here, not in the view

interfaces.name: ShareComposePayload
interfaces.signature: struct ShareComposePayload: Sendable { let recipients: [CircleMember]; let messageText: String }
interfaces.notes: outbound share construction input

interfaces.name: ShareComposePresentation
interfaces.signature: enum ShareComposePresentation { case messages(recipients: [String], body: String); case activityFallback(items: [Any]) }
interfaces.notes: case names correspond 1:1 with ShareChannel

interfaces.name: ContactPickerService
interfaces.signature: protocol ContactPickerService: Sendable { func pickContact() async -> PickedContact? }
interfaces.notes: wraps CNContactPickerViewController; no Contacts entitlement required

interfaces.name: PickedContact
interfaces.signature: struct PickedContact: Sendable { let name: String; let phoneNumber: String?; let email: String?; let contactIdentifier: String? }
interfaces.notes: manual fallback remains available for non-picker recipients

interfaces.name: Clock
interfaces.signature: protocol Clock: Sendable { func now() -> Date }
interfaces.notes: injected everywhere date math happens; never Date() directly in feature models

interfaces.name: StreakCalculator
interfaces.signature: enum StreakCalculator { static func currentStreak(entryDates: [Date], calendar: Calendar, now: Date) -> Int }
interfaces.notes: pure function; tested across midnight/timezone/DST edge cases

interfaces.name: ShareTextFormatter
interfaces.signature: enum ShareTextFormatter { static func formatShareText(bookTitle: String, author: String, quote: String, pageLocation: String?, reflection: String?, rating: Int?) -> String }
interfaces.notes: produces the real content sent via Messages; never placeholder text

interfaces.name: BiometricAuthService
interfaces.signature: protocol BiometricAuthService: Sendable { func canEvaluatePolicy() -> Bool; func authenticate(reason: String) async -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: requires NSFaceIDUsageDescription; passcode fallback handled by LAContext itself

interfaces.name: AppRouter
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class AppRouter { var path: NavigationPath; func push(_ route: Route); func popToRoot() }
interfaces.notes: single stack rooted at Timeline; Stats/Circle pushed via nav-bar icons, never tabs

interfaces.name: Route
interfaces.signature: enum Route: Hashable { case bookDetail(UUID); case entryDetail(UUID); case stats; case circle }
interfaces.notes: minimum deployment target iOS 18; entryDetail push uses .navigationTransition(.zoom(sourceID:in:)) as the sole implementation, no matchedGeometryEffect fallback anywhere in the codebase

interfaces.name: CaptureCoordinator
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class CaptureCoordinator { var step: CaptureStep; func chooseManual(); func chooseScan() async; func retake() async; func typeInstead(); func continueToCompose(with text: String) }
interfaces.notes: self-contained modal flow, own back-stack, never touches AppRouter

interfaces.name: CaptureStep
interfaces.signature: enum CaptureStep { case chooser; case scanning; case ocrReview(RecognizedTextResult); case compose(EntryDraft); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: ocrReview always offers Retake/Type instead/Continue exactly as locked in design phase

interfaces.name: AppLockController
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class AppLockController { var isLocked: Bool; func handleScenePhaseChange(_ phase: ScenePhase) }
interfaces.notes: gates on .background with a grace window, not .inactive

interfaces.name: CurrentlyReadingWidgetProvider
interfaces.signature: struct CurrentlyReadingWidgetProvider: TimelineProvider { func placeholder(in: Context) -> CurrentlyReadingEntry; func getSnapshot(in: Context, completion: (CurrentlyReadingEntry) -> Void); func getTimeline(in: Context, completion: (Timeline<CurrentlyReadingEntry>) -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: reads App Group ModelContainer via buildSharedModelContainer with its own fresh ModelContext

interfaces.name: StreakWidgetProvider
interfaces.signature: struct StreakWidgetProvider: TimelineProvider { func placeholder(in: Context) -> StreakEntry; func getSnapshot(in: Context, completion: (StreakEntry) -> Void); func getTimeline(in: Context, completion: (Timeline<StreakEntry>) -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: own fresh ModelContext against the same App Group store URL

interfaces.name: LogQuoteIntent
interfaces.signature: struct LogQuoteIntent: AppIntent { static var title: LocalizedStringResource; @Parameter var quoteText: String; func perform() async throws -> some IntentResult & ProvidesDialog }
interfaces.notes: lives in the main app target, no separate intents extension; always confirms book attachment before save
